text:
(In reply to Alfredo Dal'Ava Junior from comment #2)

I will check the references, thanks.

Last time I tried to use the provided ISO, OpenFirmware did not see my Firewire drive with a written image on it. I think MacOS DiskUtility could not use ISO to make a clone at all, and I had to resort to some third-party app for that.
